message:
feat(mux-server): vendor frankenterm-mux-server binary and impl library (ft-1memj.33)

Add the headless mux server as standalone crates:

- frankenterm-mux-server-impl (1,663 lines): PKI certificate management,
  session handler dispatch with per-domain routing, local domain support
  for direct process spawning
- frankenterm-mux-server (601 lines): binary entry point with
  daemonization, OpenSSL initialization, CLI argument parsing

Enables frankenterm to run a headless mux server for remote and
multiplexed terminal sessions independent of the GUI binary.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+[package]
+name = "frankenterm-mux-server-impl"
+description = "FrankenTerm headless mux server support library"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+rust-version.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+license-file.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+publish = false
+
+[dependencies]
+anyhow.workspace = true
+async-io.workspace = true
+async_ossl.workspace = true
+codec.workspace = true
+config.workspace = true
+dns-lookup.workspace = true
+futures.workspace = true
+hostname.workspace = true
+lazy_static.workspace = true
+libc.workspace = true
+log.workspace = true
+mux.workspace = true
+portable-pty = { workspace=true, features = ["serde_support"]}
+promise.workspace = true
+rangeset.workspace = true
+rcgen.workspace = true
+smol.workspace = true
+termwiz = { workspace=true, features=["use_serde"] }
+url.workspace = true
+wezterm-client.workspace = true
+wezterm-term = { workspace=true, features=["use_serde"] }
+wezterm-uds.workspace = true
+
+[target."cfg(windows)".dependencies]
+winapi = { workspace=true, features = [ "winuser" ]}
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true

@@ -0,0 +1,38 @@
+[package]
+name = "frankenterm-mux-server"
+description = "FrankenTerm headless mux server binary"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+rust-version.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+license-file.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+publish = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "frankenterm-mux-server"
+path = "src/main.rs"
+
+[dependencies]
+anyhow.workspace = true
+async_ossl.workspace = true
+clap.workspace = true
+config.workspace = true
+libc.workspace = true
+log.workspace = true
+mux.workspace = true
+mlua.workspace = true
+openssl.workspace = true
+portable-pty = { workspace=true, features = ["serde_support"]}
+promise.workspace = true
+umask.workspace = true
+wezterm-blob-leases = {workspace=true, features=["simple_tempdir"]}
+frankenterm-mux-server-impl.workspace = true
+wezterm-gui-subcommands.workspace = true
+wezterm-term.workspace = true
+
+[target."cfg(windows)".dependencies]
+winapi = { workspace=true, features = [ "winuser" ]}
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true
